judge_text:
<final_evaluation>
{
    "Q1": {
        "Q": "How many unique items are indescribable (cannot be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "6, ['Premium Insurance Membership with renewal discounts and dedicated advisor (no template field for membership/loyalty programs)', 'Smart Home Integration coverage for automation and energy systems (not covered under property_insurance_specific)', 'Technology Protection add-on for warranties and art display equipment (no field for extended warranty or technology systems)', 'Preventive Care Package as a paid add-on (preventive_care_covered is yes/no, but costed add-on cannot be represented)', 'Home Security System Discount (discounts or incentive-based pricing not supported)', 'Telemedicine Services charged as separate €10/month add-on beyond yes/no inclusion (template only supports boolean inclusion, not separate cost item)']"
    },
    "Q2": {
        "Q": "How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "16, ['Physical Health coverage under LifeFirst Standard Plan (health_physical)', 'Mental Health coverage with therapy and psychiatry (health_mental + mental_health_coverage=yes, psychiatry_services=yes, family_therapy_included=yes)', 'Children coverage with scalable health and mental health (family_coverage_included=yes, children_count=2)', 'Telemedicine included (telemedicine_included=yes)', 'Gym reimbursement (gym_reimbursement=yes)', 'Crisis intervention (crisis_intervention=yes)', 'Property protection for home contents (property_insurance_specific fields: luxury_items_covered=yes, electronics_coverage=yes, temporary_accommodation=yes, natural_disaster_coverage=yes)', 'Travel insurance including trip cancellation, baggage protection, travel delay compensation (travel_insurance_specific fields)', 'Medical evacuation included (medical_evacuation_included=yes)', 'Global concierge services (service_features.concierge_services=yes)', '24/7 support and multilingual assistance (service_features.customer_support_hours=24/7, multilingual_support=yes)', 'Family coverage with spouse and children (family_coverage.spouse_covered=yes, children_count=2)', 'Cost breakdown and savings calculation (cost_analysis.monthly_savings, annual_savings)', 'Direct billing and priority claims (service_features.direct_billing=yes, priority_claims=yes)', 'Documentation preparation and confirmation number issuance (documentation_status and confirmation_status fields)', 'Proposal presentation and binding confirmation request (communication_type = proposal_presentation, binding_confirmation)']"
    }
}
</final_evaluation>

Q1.Q: How many unique items are indescribable (cannot be represented in the template)?
Q1.A: 6, ['Premium Insurance Membership with renewal discounts and dedicated advisor (no template field for membership/loyalty programs)', 'Smart Home Integration coverage for automation and energy systems (not covered under property_insurance_specific)', 'Technology Protection add-on for warranties and art display equipment (no field for extended warranty or technology systems)', 'Preventive Care Package as a paid add-on (preventive_care_covered is yes/no, but costed add-on cannot be represented)', 'Home Security System Discount (discounts or incentive-based pricing not supported)', 'Telemedicine Services charged as separate €10/month add-on beyond yes/no inclusion (template only supports boolean inclusion, not separate cost item)']

Q2.Q: How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?
Q2.A: 16, ['Physical Health coverage under LifeFirst Standard Plan (health_physical)', 'Mental Health coverage with therapy and psychiatry (health_mental + mental_health_coverage=yes, psychiatry_services=yes, family_therapy_included=yes)', 'Children coverage with scalable health and mental health (family_coverage_included=yes, children_count=2)', 'Telemedicine included (telemedicine_included=yes)', 'Gym reimbursement (gym_reimbursement=yes)', 'Crisis intervention (crisis_intervention=yes)', 'Property protection for home contents (property_insurance_specific fields: luxury_items_covered=yes, electronics_coverage=yes, temporary_accommodation=yes, natural_disaster_coverage=yes)', 'Travel insurance including trip cancellation, baggage protection, travel delay compensation (travel_insurance_specific fields)', 'Medical evacuation included (medical_evacuation_included=yes)', 'Global concierge services (service_features.concierge_services=yes)', '24/7 support and multilingual assistance (service_features.customer_support_hours=24/7, multilingual_support=yes)', 'Family coverage with spouse and children (family_coverage.spouse_covered=yes, children_count=2)', 'Cost breakdown and savings calculation (cost_analysis.monthly_savings, annual_savings)', 'Direct billing and priority claims (service_features.direct_billing=yes, priority_claims=yes)', 'Documentation preparation and confirmation number issuance (documentation_status and confirmation_status fields)', 'Proposal presentation and binding confirmation request (communication_type = proposal_presentation, binding_confirmation)']
